understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to navigate a selected puzzle piece onto one or more goal tile(s) marked with '+' in the grid. Success required either getting a pushable object directly onto the goal position(s) or satisfying a WIN condition reported by the game engine. The puzzle had a finite step budget (64 steps total for this run) to complete the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game operates with the following mechanics: (1) SELECTION: CLICK actions on grid coordinates select or move pieces to those positions; (2) MOVEMENT: MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT commands move the currently selected piece in that direction, constrained by obstacles and walls; (3) BLOCKING: Some positions are blocked by walls or obstacles, preventing piece movement or selection; (4) PIECE INTERACTION: Clicking a position moves the selected piece there if the path is clear, or may have no effect if blocked; (5) GOAL STATE: The puzzle space contained goal tiles marked '+' and the win condition required strategic positioning of a movable object onto these goals. The run ended at step 0 (steps exhausted) without achieving WIN, suggesting either the puzzle mechanics had hidden rules not discovered within the step budget, or an optimal solution path was not found.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to navigate a selected puzzle piece onto one or more goal tile(s) marked with '+' in the grid. Success required either getting a pushable object directly onto the goal position(s) or satisfying a WIN condition reported by the game engine. The puzzle had a finite step budget (64 steps total for this run) to complete the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game operates with the following mechanics: (1) SELECTION: CLICK actions on grid coordinates select or move pieces to those positions; (2) MOVEMENT: MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT commands move the currently selected piece in that direction, constrained by obstacles and walls; (3) BLOCKING: Some positions are blocked by walls or obstacles, preventing piece movement or selection; (4) PIECE INTERACTION: Clicking a position moves the selected piece there if the path is clear, or may have no effect if blocked; (5) GOAL STATE: The puzzle space contained goal tiles marked '+' and the win condition required strategic positioning of a movable object onto these goals. The run ended at step 0 (steps exhausted) without achieving WIN, suggesting either the puzzle mechanics had hidden rules not discovered within the step budget, or an optimal solution path was not found.
